CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Statut__c , "Terminé"), "✅ Terminée", IF( ISPICKVAL(Statut__c , "En cours"), "⏳ En cours", IF( ISPICKVAL(Statut__c , "En retard"), "🚨 En retard", IF( ISPICKVAL(Statut__c , "Suspendu"), " 🚫 Suspendu", IF( ISPICKVAL(Statut__c , "En attente"), "⏸️ En attente", "" ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 🚦 Statut
